commands.name: add
commands.description:
Adds a new change to the 'Added' section of the current
unreleased version

options.name: -p
options.description:
(Default: changelog.md) Path to the changelog file that
will be created

arguments.name: MESSAGE
arguments.description: The message that should be added to the section

commands.name: change
commands.description:
Adds a new change to the 'Changed' section of the current
unreleased version

options.name: -p
options.description:
(Default: changelog.md) Path to the changelog file that
will be created

arguments.name: MESSAGE
arguments.description: The message that should be added to the section

commands.name: compare
commands.description:
Generate compare URLs for all version found in the changelog.
This will overwrite any previous compare URLs.

options.name: -b
options.description:
Base url for generated links. When using github.com or
gitlab.com release and compare templates are automatically
determined.

options.name: -c
options.description:
Template for an URL that compares two tags. Only needed when
using an unknown base url.

options.name: -r
options.description:
Template for an URL that directly links to a release. Only needed
when using an unknown base url.

options.name: -p
options.description:
(Default: changelog.md) Path to the changelog file that will be
created

commands.name: deprecate
commands.description:
Adds a new change to the 'Deprecated' section of the current
unreleased version

options.name: -p
options.description:
(Default: changelog.md) Path to the changelog file that
will be created

arguments.name: MESSAGE
arguments.description: The message that should be added to the section

commands.name: extract
commands.description: Extract changes for a single version from a changelog

options.name: -h
options.description:
(Default: false) Include header from version in extracted
file

options.name: -t
options.description: Target file to extract changes to

options.name: -p
options.description:
(Default: changelog.md) Path to the changelog file that
will be created

commands.name: fix
commands.description:
Adds a new change to the 'Fixed' section of the current
unreleased version

options.name: -p
options.description:
(Default: changelog.md) Path to the changelog file that
will be created

arguments.name: MESSAGE
arguments.description: The message that should be added to the section

commands.name: help
commands.description: Display more information on a specific command.

options.name: -o
options.description:
(Default: false) Indicates whether an existing changelog should
be overwritten

options.name: --semver
options.description: (Default: true) Indicates the project uses semver

options.name: -p
options.description:
(Default: changelog.md) Path to the changelog file that will be
created

commands.name: release
commands.description: Marks the latest unreleased version as released

options.name: -d
options.description:
The date to use for this release. If omitted the current date
will be used

options.name: -f
options.description:
(Default: false) Force release even if version is older than
already released versions

options.name: -p
options.description:
(Default: changelog.md) Path to the changelog file that will
be created

arguments.name: NAME
arguments.description: Name of the version to release.

commands.name: remove
commands.description:
Adds a new change to the 'Removed' section of the current
unreleased version

options.name: -p
options.description:
(Default: changelog.md) Path to the changelog file that
will be created

arguments.name: MESSAGE
arguments.description: The message that should be added to the section

arguments.name: MESSAGE

commands.name: yank
commands.description: Yanks the latest released version in the changelog

options.name: -p
options.description:
(Default: changelog.md) Path to the changelog file that will be
created
